parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor interacting with a smartphone app. The lighting, movements, and environment are natural and consistent with human-recorded footage.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Long, straight blonde hair. She has a neutral to slightly expressive face with light makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Light grey oversized hoodie with dark lettering on the front.
characters.demeanor: Focused, slightly confused at times, but engaged and conversational.

scenes.setting: A dimly lit room with purple/pink ambient lighting. A gaming chair is visible in the background. The character is seated at a desk with a coloring book and a smartphone.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated at a desk, facing the camera. She is holding a blue colored pencil and coloring in a detailed book. Her smartphone is resting on the desk to her right, displaying an app interface. The room is illuminated with a soft purple/pink glow. A white and pink gaming chair is partially visible behind her on the left. She looks between her coloring book, the phone, and the camera as she speaks.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a continuous shot of Character A at her desk. She is engaged in a coloring activity while interacting with a language learning app on her phone. The lighting is moody with purple and pink hues. Text overlays and subtitles appear throughout the scene, translating the conversation between Spanish and English.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: ¿Hablas español? [Do you speak Spanish?]
Character A says: Sí, yo conozco español. [Yes, I know Spanish.]
Unknown speaker says: Técnicamente es correcto, pero los hablantes nativos simplemente dicen, hablo español. [Technically it's correct, but native speakers simply say, I speak Spanish.]
Character A says: Ah, hablo español. [Ah, I speak Spanish.]
Unknown speaker says: ¿Cuántos años tienes? [How old are you?]
Character A says: Soy veinticuatro años. [I am twenty-four.]
Unknown speaker says: Quieres decir, tengo veinticuatro años. [You mean, I am twenty-four years old.]
Character A says: Tengo veinticuatro años. [I am twenty-four years old.]
Unknown speaker says: ¿Cómo te llamas? [What's your name?]
Character A says: Mi nombre es Nesly. [My name is Nesly.]
Unknown speaker says: Los hablantes nativos normalmente dicen, me llamo Nesly. [Native speakers normally say, my name is Nesly.]
Character A says: Mmm, me llamo Nesly. [Mmm, my name is Nesly.]
Unknown speaker says: Bien hecho. [Well done.]
Character A says: Gracias, ¿pero quién eres tú? [Thanks, but who are you?]
Unknown speaker says: Soy un tutor de IA en Praktika. Podemos hablar así todos los días para aprender español. [I'm an AI tutor at Praktika. We can talk like this every day to learn Spanish.]
Character A says: Pero mi español es A1. No puedo hablar. [But my Spanish is A1. I can't speak.]
Unknown speaker says: No te preocupes. Puedo enseñarte en tu lengua materna mientras aprendes español. [Don't worry. I can teach you in your native language while you learn Spanish.]
Character A says: ¿Conoces mi idioma? [Do you know my language?]
Unknown speaker says: Claro, soy una IA. [Of course, I'm an AI.]
Character A says: Vale, voy a descargar esta aplicación ahora. [Okay, I'm going to download this app now.]
